news.summary: A new report reveals that the unemployment rate in the country has increased by 2.5%, reaching a total of 7.8%. This surge in unemployment is the highest recorded in the last decade. The number of job losses has also risen significantly, with 1.2 million workers being affected. The report attributes this unfortunate situation to the ongoing pandemic, which has caused severe disruptions to various industries. The government is now implementing measures to support those who have lost their jobs and to stimulate economic recovery. Despite these efforts, the road to full employment appears to be challenging given the current circumstances.
news.headline: Stocks rise as investors weigh tariff options.

news.summary: The Energy Transmission and Exchange Group EPSO-G is a company with the legal entity code 302826889 and its registered address is Laisvės pr. 10, Vilnius, Lithuania. EPSO-G operates in the energy sector, facilitating the transmission and exchange of energy services. The company plays a crucial role in providing energy services to consumers and businesses, contributing to the overall stability and efficiency of the energy market. EPSO-G's operations are essential for ensuring a smooth flow of energy resources and maintaining a reliable energy supply for the region.
news.headline: AGM of Shareholders of UAB EPSO-G held; legal entity code 302826889, registered in Vilnius, Lithuania.

news.summary: In London on April 15, 2025, Aidan O'Rourke, a Partner at Quinn Emanuel Urquhart & Sullivan representing the Claimants, announced that all holders of Argentina EUR-denominated GDP warrants are seeking to address a statement. The Claimants, in the ongoing proceeding, are requesting to convey their position through their representative.
news.headline: Partners LP & Ors sue Argentina for EUR-denominated GDP warrants in London court CA-2023-001273. A statement by the claimants awaits.

news.summary: James (Josh) Wilson, a Securities Litigation Partner at Faruqi & Faruqi, LLP, is urging investors who experienced losses surpassing $50,000 in Perpetua between April 17, 2024, and February 13, 2025, to reach out to him for a discussion about their potential next steps.
news.headline: Investors of Perpetua Resources Corp with losses exceeding $50,000 between April 17, 2024 and February 13, 2025 urged to contact Faruqi & Faruqi, LLP.

news.summary: At the close of March 2025, the net asset value (NAV) per unit for the Baltic Horizon Fund dropped to EUR 0.6769, down from EUR 0.6826 on February 28, 2025. The Fund's total net asset value by the end of March was EUR 97.2 million compared to EUR 98.0 million at the end of February. As of March 31, 2025, the EPRA NRV per unit was recorded at EUR 0.7209.
news.headline: Baltic Horizon Fund's NAV decreased to EUR 0.6769 in March 2025, total asset value was EUR 97.2 million. EPRA NRV at EUR 0.7209/unit.

news.summary: LTC Properties Inc. (NYSE: LTC) is set to report its first quarter earnings on May 5, 2025, following the close of the market. The company will host a conference call on May 6, 2025, at 8:00 a.m. Pacific / 11:00 a.m. Eastern to discuss its performance for the quarter ending on March 31, 2025. Interested individuals can join the live conference call through the webcast on LTC's website www.LTCReit.com.
news.headline: LTC to release Q1 2025 earnings on May 5, 2025, followed by conference call on May 6, 2025 at 8:00 a.m. PT / 11:00 a.m. ET.

news.summary: Securities Litigation Partner James (Josh) Wilson of Faruqi & Faruqi, LLP is urging investors who have incurred losses surpassing $100,000 in Solaris from July 9, 2024, to March 17, 2025, to reach out directly. If you fall under this category, it is recommended to contact him promptly to explore potential courses of action.
news.headline: Investors of Solaris Energy with losses exceeding $100,000 between July 9, 2024 and March 17, 2025 urged to contact Faruqi & Faruqi, LLP for claims.

news.summary: A well-established veteran-owned company, Shumaker Roofing Co., located in Frederick, Maryland, has been providing exceptional services to homeowners, businesses, and government contracts for decades. With a long-standing presence in Frederick County since the 1940s, the company recently obtained certification as a Service-Disabled Veteran-Owned Small Business. This certification further solidifies their reputation for delivering unmatched value to their clients.
news.headline: Shumaker Roofing Co. in Frederick, MD, celebrates 75+ years with SDVOSB certification & lifetime warranties, pioneering innovations.

news.summary: The base shelf prospectus is now available for public access. The prospectus supplement will also be accessible on SEDAR within the next two business days.
news.headline: Capital Power is increasing previously announced bought offering of common shares; prospectus accessible on SEDAR+ in 2 days.

news.summary: A total of approximately 20,000 square feet of duty-free shopping space will showcase renowned global brands as well as unique artisanal products from New York City and Queens. This flagship store will span multiple levels and will be accompanied by four more duty-free locations spread throughout the terminal. The aim is to capture the essence of New York City through the retail experience provided to visitors.
news.headline: Duty Free Americas chosen as operator for JFK Airport's Terminal One, featuring 20,000 sq ft of shopping space with iconic brands.

news.summary: A recent transaction between Omni Bridgeway (ASX: OBL) and funds managed by Ares Management Corporation (NYSE: ARES) has resulted in the establishment of a new continuation fund, Omni Bridgeway Fund 9. This new fund has completed the purchase of Omni Bridgeway's co-investment. The deal was officially closed in Sydney on April 15, 2025. This strategic move marks a significant development in the financial market and is expected to impact both companies' portfolios.
news.headline: Omni Bridgeway and Ares Management complete A$320M secondary market transaction for legal assets. Landmark deal.

news.summary: PumpSwap, the decentralized exchange of memecoin launch platform Pump.Fun, recorded $2.5 billion in trades last week, marking a significant increase from $1.8 billion the previous week and total trades of $98.4 million since late March. The DEX experienced a surge in trading volume, with a daily record high of over 6.1 million trades on April 12 and 5.7 million swaps on April 14. It reached a daily volume record of $417.8 million on April 15. Daily fees hit a record of $1.05 million on April 14, with $840,000 going to liquidity providers and $210,000 to the protocol. The DEX features a 0.25% fee, with $14.2 million in total lifetime fees generated. Dune data shows 506 wallets earning over $1 million on Pump.Fun, while over 9,000 made over $100,000, with the top wallet earning nearly $40.6 million in profits in the past 30 days.
news.headline: Last week, PumpSwap DEX of Pump.Fun processed $2.5B in trades, up 40% from the previous week. Activity peaked at $417.8M on April 15.

news.summary: A recent Request for Proposals (RFP) has been issued by TEDCO, Maryland's hub for technology firms, seeking submissions for a website redesign by June 6, 2025. The announcement was made in Columbia, Md., on April 15, 2025. TEDCO has emphasized its dedication to enhancing its online presence through this RFP process.
news.headline: TEDCO in Maryland is searching for a firm to redesign its website, with submissions due by June 6, 2025.

news.summary: James (Josh) Wilson, Securities Litigation Partner at Faruqi & Faruqi, LLP, is urging investors who have incurred losses surpassing $75,000 in Everus between October 31, 2024, and February 11, 2025, to get in touch with him promptly to explore potential courses of action.
news.headline: Deadline alert: Faruqi & Faruqi, LLP investigates claims for Everus investors who lost over $75,000 from Oct 31, 2024 - Feb 11, 2025. Contact James Wilson.

news.summary: In Honey Brook, Pennsylvania on April 15, 2025, innovative noise barriers by Superior have been installed along the Van Wyck Expressway, reaching heights of up to 28 feet in certain sections. These barriers showcase Superior's dedication to quality and expertise in managing noise pollution on this bustling roadway.
news.headline: Superior's 28 ft noise barriers on Van Wyck Expressway reduce noise levels significantly.

news.summary: This press release is intended for circulation among non-U.S. news outlets and should not be distributed to U.S. newswires for publication within the United States.
news.headline: Probe Gold closed a $45 million bought deal private placement. Note: Not for distribution to U.S. newswires.

news.summary: The US Enterprise Asset Management Market is projected to grow from USD 1.9 billion in 2023 to USD 2.7 billion in 2028, with a Compound Annual Growth Rate (CAGR) of 7.1%. Factors fueling this growth include the increasing adoption of AI-powered predictive maintenance, the necessity for asset lifecycle optimization, and the emergence of cloud-based EAM solutions. Major key players in this market include IBM, Oracle, Accruent, Aptean, eMaint, UpKeep, RF gen, AssetWorks, Asset Panda, and EZOfficeinventory. The solution segment holds the largest market share, driven by the demand for AI-powered predictive maintenance, real-time asset tracking, and cloud-based EAM platforms. This growth is supported by various sectors like manufacturing, energy, and transport, aiming to enhance operational efficiency and maximize asset performance. Implementation costs and integration complexities with legacy systems pose as potential challenges that could impede market growth.
news.headline: US EAM market to grow to $2.7B by 2028, led by IBM, Oracle, Accruent, and Aptean. CAGR of 7.1%, driven by AI, cloud-based solutions, and lifecycle optimization. (characters: 216)

news.summary: Loftware, a top provider of Enterprise Labeling and Artwork Management solutions, revealed today the launch of two fresh integrations designed to streamline labeling processes. The new integrations aim to decrease errors, bolster regulatory compliance, and overall simplify operations for businesses utilizing SAP systems. This announcement comes out of Portsmouth, N.H. on April 15, 2025. This move is expected to significantly benefit businesses by improving labeling efficiency and reducing errors, ultimately boosting regulatory compliance figures.
news.headline: Loftware introduces 2 new SAP integrations for accurate labeling, reducing errors & enhancing compliance.

news.summary: Anne Fischer has been appointed as the new Chief Marketing Officer of Schulte Hospitality Group, a top hotel management and development company based in Louisville, Kentucky. The company boasts a vast portfolio of more than 230 properties spread across six countries. This announcement was made on April 15, 2025, via PRNewswire. Anne Fischer's role as CMO marks a significant addition to the executive team of the company, reflecting its commitment to strategic marketing initiatives.
news.headline: Schulte Hospitality Group appoints Anne Fischer as Chief Marketing Officer overseeing 230+ properties in 6 countries.

news.summary: Echo Global Logistics, Inc. has achieved a remarkable feat by securing the prestigious Top Workplaces USA award for the third consecutive year. This renowned Chicago-based company specializes in offering technology-driven transportation and supply chain management solutions. The award reaffirms their commitment to excellence in the industry.
news.headline: Echo Global Logistics awarded 2025 USA Today Top Workplaces for 3rd consecutive year. Leading transportation provider.

news.summary: A company based in San Francisco, Virtue AI, has recently disclosed $30 million in funding from investors Lightspeed Venture Partners, Walden Catalyst Ventures, Prosperity7, and others. The seed and Series A funding round was announced by Virtue AI, an organization established by experienced AI safety and security specialists. The investment aims to propel Virtue AI's goal of eradicating the conventional compromise between AI advancement and security in enterprises. Notable investors participating in this funding round include Factory, Osage University Partners, Lip-Bu Tan, Amarjit Gill, and Chris Re.
news.headline: Virtue AI secures $30M funding from Lightspeed Venture Partners and Walden Catalyst Ventures to enhance AI security.

news.summary: Windstream Wholesale has unveiled a major network upgrade between Houston, TX, and Tallahassee, FL, using Ciena line systems. Through this partnership, the company aims to boost capacity, expand service offerings, and enhance network efficiency. The deployment of cutting-edge technology allows Windstream Wholesale to provide 400G services across multiple routes, catering to its customers' growing connectivity needs.
news.headline: Windstream Wholesale & Ciena upgrade network capacity to 400G in the Southeast from Houston to Tallahassee.

news.summary: In Denver, DirectDefense, Inc., an infosec firm, unveiled the "2025 Security Operations Threat Report," unveiling threat types and frequencies. The report discusses attacker patterns, threat evolution, and predicts major threats for 2025. Throughout 2024, DirectDefense managed over 10 million log events for swift identification, response, and handling of possible cyber threats.
news.headline: DirectDefense's annual report reveals top attack tactics and emerging threats for 2025 after processing 10 million log events in 2024.

news.summary: A new suite of cybersecurity services has been unveiled by Full Spectrum, a fast-growing company based in Southborough, Mass. Specializing in product development and engineering services for medical device, digital health, and life science industries, the company aims to tackle the rising importance of cybersecurity. The services will cater to the increasing need for privacy, safety, and reliability in an interconnected world. This announcement highlights Full Spectrum's commitment to addressing these critical concerns as they expand their offerings in response to growing demand.
news.headline: Full Spectrum, based in Southborough, Mass., has launched new cybersecurity services for medical device, digital health, and life science industries to address increasing importance of privacy and safety in an interconnected world. #cybersecurity.

news.summary: Stockholders are set to receive a dividend payment of $0.20 per share on May 28, 2025. This payment will be made to shareholders who are recorded as owning stock on May 1, 2025.
news.headline: Q.E.P. Co., Inc. declares $0.20 per share cash dividend for first quarter, payable on May 28, 2025, to stockholders on record on May 1, 2025.

news.summary: In Tamarac, Florida on April 15, 2025, it was reported that heart disease remains the primary cause of death in the United States. Recognizing this, CITY Furniture (CITY) has taken a proactive stance. The company participated alongside numerous others in the American Heart Association Broward Heart Walk event. This initiative highlighted the urgency of addressing heart health concerns, with thousands of individuals coming together to support the cause.
news.headline: CITY Furniture partners with American Heart Association to train workforce in CPR; combating heart disease. Leading cause of death, takes action.
